Statement: Player controls a car on a track
Acceptance Criteria: Car responds to keyboard/touch input; car moves on track surface

Statement: Player scores points by executing controlled drifts
Acceptance Criteria: Drift detected → points awarded → displayed on HUD
Three.js scene renders; car and track visible in browser

Statement: Physics-based car handling with realistic drift mechanics
Acceptance Criteria: Cannon.js or Rapier rigid body; drift state triggers when slip angle exceeded
Track mesh visible; car constrained to track surface
Higher angle = higher multiplier; angle tracked in real-time

Statement: Speed boost rewards for long drifts
Acceptance Criteria: Boost meter fills after sustained drift; boost applied on drift end
Low-poly car and track models; flat-shaded or toon shading
Saturated color palette; track and car visually distinct
Glowing tire trails, track edges, or score pop-ups in neon
Camera follows car with smooth lerp; shifts on drift for dramatic angle
requestAnimationFrame loop; physics step fixed at 60Hz
Input latency < 1 frame; keyboard WASD/arrows and touch joystick
